TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Yukan_Temu, title = Yukan_Temu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Yukan_Temu} }

S.FORM: panmwo:Infobox person Yukan Temu (lalu na theluw: śĹėŚźõšĺĖ; lalu na ego: Masha Pan; ryax sa 2 na byacing tay 5 squ kawas na 1994 - squ ) hya ga squliq ka myugi ru mqwas 'tayal taywan. girang hintgan. msqutux ka GTM. myugi ru mqwas ega 2022 - Batu : Hawa 2022 - Kueytyansya : Ryusawcun teribi dorama 2015 - Ryawrikawsyawsen 2016 - Uwheuwdesiciswe 2017 - Siciwangcyangda hngzyang qwas šłćŚģĆÁĺéÁī≥Ś£ę OKAY qabu' te 26 Cincicyang - śúÄšĹ≥śľĒŚĒĪÁĶĄŚźąÁćé Cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Facebook Instagram YouTube

panmwo:Infobox person Yukan Temu (lalu na theluw: śĹėŚźõšĺĖ; lalu na ego: Masha Pan; ryax sa 2 na byacing tay 5 squ kawas na 1994 - squ ) hya ga squliq ka myugi ru mqwas 'tayal taywan. girang hintgan. msqutux ka GTM. myugi ru mqwas ega 2022 - Batu : Hawa 2022 - Kueytyansya : Ryusawcun teribi dorama 2015 - Ryawrikawsyawsen 2016 - Uwheuwdesiciswe 2017 - Siciwangcyangda hngzyang qwas šłćŚģĆÁĺéÁī≥Ś£ę OKAY qabu' te 26 Cincicyang - śúÄšĹ≥śľĒŚĒĪÁĶĄŚźąÁćé Cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Facebook Instagram YouTube
